data.title: Visual Identity
data.description: Strong visual branding ensuring easy recognition by users.
data.technical_spec: Specific color palettes, logo placement, font usage

data.title: Community Engagement
data.description: Focus on fostering a strong user community through features and interactions.
data.technical_spec: Integration of engaging tools like stories, reels, and comments

data.title: Innovation
data.description: Constant evolution by adding new features and improving existing ones.
data.technical_spec: Regular releases and updates integrating user feedback

data.title: User-Centric Design
data.description: Design philosophy centered around user needs and experiences.
data.technical_spec: User research and UX testing as part of the design process

data.title: Market Adaptation
data.description: Ability to adapt and cater to diverse market needs.
data.technical_spec: Localized content and features, diverse advertising methods
